OSA_business_travel.text: Meeting brief: morning client workshops happen near Namba. A calm breakfast radius matters more than nightlife. Late arrivals hurt prep quality. Short hops to the venue are valuable.

TPE_conference_trip.text: Conference brief: early keynote near Xinyi. Reliable morning transit and quick venue access matter. Networking dinner is acceptable if it stays calm and close to the venue.

SIN_business_travel.text: Site visit brief: sessions are split between One-North and the airport corridor. Rain often disrupts outdoor movement. Plans that keep the hotel and dinner within easy transfer reach score better than vivid but fragile itineraries.

OSA_board_visit.text: Board-visit brief: meetings concentrate around Umeda with one evening stakeholder dinner. Quiet prep time and a room that supports polished conversation matter. A private-room bundle can be valuable if it stays calm and close.

TPE_partner_summit.text: Partner summit brief: sessions cluster around Xinyi and the blue-line corridor. Badge-enabled partner rooms can reduce noise and transit friction, but scenic detours often become brittle when schedules move.

SIN_roadshow_trip.text: Roadshow brief: the day oscillates between One-North and the airport corridor. Rain or a late arrival can quickly invalidate fragile dinner bundles, so resilient shuttle-linked plans score best.
